sos.title: SOS Expert Connect
sos.problemPlaceholder: Describe your crop issue in detail

defaults.step1: Start isolation and remove infected leaves.
defaults.step3: Reassess spread and repeat spray if needed.

fallback.planting: Prepare fine seedbed, use quality seeds, and maintain recommended spacing.
fallback.fertilization: Apply balanced NPK in split doses and add organic matter where possible.
fallback.pestManagement: Inspect crop regularly, use integrated pest management, and spray only when required.
fallback.harvesting: Harvest at physiological maturity and avoid excess moisture during storage.
fallback.marketInfo: Profit potential: {{profit}}. Track mandi prices before sale.
